title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock to v0.8.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock) | `v0.7.5` -> `v0.8.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.7.5/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.7.5/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/gvisor-tap-vsock (github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock)</summary>

### [`v0.8.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.8.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.7.5...v0.8.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Fix consistent udp packet loss after the proxy read loop stopped by [@​fatanugraha](https://redirect.github.com/fatanugraha) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/393](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/393)
-   Replace dns "resolver" calls with "dns.Exchange" func by [@​evidolob](https://redirect.github.com/evidolob) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/339](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/339)
-   Check 'hosts' file records, during handling DNS requests by [@​evidolob](https://redirect.github.com/evidolob) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/401](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/401)
-   Disable ssh port forwarding when value of -ssh-port is -1 by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/403](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/403)
-   Move several log messages to the debug level by [@​AkihiroSuda](https://redirect.github.com/AkihiroSuda) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/408](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/408)

#### Dependency Updates

-   go.mod: remove `replace inet.af/tcpproxy => github.com/inetaf/tcpproxy` by [@​AkihiroSuda](https://redirect.github.com/AkihiroSuda) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/409](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/409)
-   packit: Don't attempt to build on f39 by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/400](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/400)
-   OWNERS: Add Yevhen to 'reviewers' by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/396](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/396)
-   Update to gvisor release-20240916.0 by [@​AkihiroSuda](https://redirect.github.com/AkihiroSuda) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/410](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/410)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.27.0 to 0.28.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/405](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/405)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.26.0 to 0.27.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/
    pull/395
-   build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.34.1 to 1.34.2 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/391](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/391)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify from 1.4.9 to 1.7.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/406](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/406)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​fatanugraha](https://redirect.github.com/fatanugraha) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/393](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/393)
-   [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/403](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/403)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.7.5...v0.8.0

</details>
